title: Bolsius D-Light Tea Lights - Pack of 45 - in Bag - Length Burning Time 8 Hours - Decorative Household Candles - White - Contains Natural Plant Wax - Without Palm Oil
features: Add a magical atmosphere to your home with our lights. Thanks to our first-class quality, MaxAmbiance technology allows you to enjoy a reliable burn time of 8 hours - a unique blend of pure wax and a specially woven cotton wick.

The more sustainable Bolsius tea lights with recycled material have a long burning time and are made with people and nature in mind: without palm oil, with natural vegan wax. Use them functionally to keep a burner or rechaud warm, or place them in a holder and bring cozy candlelight into your home.

Bolsius Candles have been manufactured since 1870. We use only the best raw materials for the production of quality candles. Each bolsius candle is produced with love and expertise. The tea lights do not soot, and there is no smoke or smoke when burning. The braided cotton wick or candle wick ensures that the candle always burns with a quiet and stable flame.

Since 1870, bolsius has been producing high-quality candles and fragrances with which you can create an atmosphere of cosiness and well-being in your home. We do this with passion, know-how and with respect for people and planet. bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that excite your senses. Make every moment special. For you, and for everyone around you.
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius Tea Lights The sustainable Bolsius tealights made from recycled material burn for a long time, contain no palm oil, and are made with natural, vegan wax. Ideal for burners, or as ambient light in candle holders. Gentle on both people and nature.
